render.title: Something went wrong while rendering
render.hint: Press the button below or restart the app.

poseModelLoad: Couldn't load the posture detection model. Check your internet connection and try again.

auth.notConfigured: Can't sign in because Supabase isn't configured.
auth.loginTimeout: Login timed out. Please try again.
auth.noCode: The authentication response has no code parameter.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

camera.denied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access for BaroSit in your system settings.
camera.notFound: No available camera was found. If you connected an external webcam, try reconnecting the USB.
camera.inUse: Another app is using the camera. Close Zoom, Photo Booth, browser tabs, etc., and try again.
camera.unsupported: This camera doesn't support the requested settings.
camera.aborted: Camera start was canceled. Please try again shortly.

backup.parseError: Couldn't read the backup file. Please check that the JSON format is valid.
backup.notBarosit: This isn't a BaroSit backup file.
backup.newerVersion: This backup is from a newer version (v{{version}}). Please update the app and try again.
